title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Yamato, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Second Floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Run, Baron corpse!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Protect Nico Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: These adver- Series are formidable!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You guys ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hang on, Robin-san, we need to take flight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I recognize them from Dressrosa...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Why are they here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Even among the the elites of CPO...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The masked agents are in a class of their own.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: pleasure hall. Left-brain tower, skull done

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could you?! She's just a young girl!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You're with the Rebel Army, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, I am, but you've got it wrong! It wasn't me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I could never...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I couldn't have...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't play dumb! You were alone with her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Get out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Smack!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: We just want to hide in peace!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't right...!! Harming a lady is the one thing I'd never do...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You beat her till she lost consciousness?! Your sadism is disgusting!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything about you goes against what I stand for!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey you're back! Muhahaha! Where'd you run off to?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Didn't you get the memo, you GERMA DOLT?! The pleasure Hall is closed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that tingling sensation stopped... is the transformation over?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I remember being lost in thought, then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Kyaa! I'm sorry! I'm...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm just a geisha from the flower capital....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kaido's men brought me here... but I'm not with them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Please, don't hurt me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The next thing I knew, she was on the floor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...Bleeding!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: She had a terrified look...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...in her eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Luffy... which version of me do you want around?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My human side has always made me useless against female enemies...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "But as a soldier of Science," I'd be able to coldy, execute "anyone you ordered me to! Ovena Beast, like this would be easy to dismember."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What kind of person does the pirate King need by his side...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not sure I know the answer, but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I've made up my mind.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ooh! :) You're finally breaking out the germa suit?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
